work.summary: Focus on Self-supervised Learning, Representation Learning, WiFi Sensing.
highlights: Used self-supervised learning frameworks for Human activity recognition (HAR) WiFi sensing.
Improved SOTA accuracy and outperformed supervised methods in few-shot learning settings.
Achieved 97% accuracy on HAR with significant compression ratio improvements.

work.summary: Lecturing on Mathematics for Computer Studies.
Focused on Semi-supervised Learning for Parkinson’s Disease Detection.
highlights: Employed pre-trained self-supervised models for diagnosing PD using handwriting records.

work.summary: Development of an all-in-One platform for doctors and patients.
highlights: Developed key features such as appointment scheduling, virtual visits, and EHR.
Built APIs with ExpressJS and frontend modules with ReactJS.
Maintained servers, databases, and implemented CI/CD pipelines.

work.summary: Developing algorithms for RoboCup 2D Soccer Simulation League.
highlights: Designed algorithms for simulated multi-agent soccer simulations in C++.
Taught programming to high school students.
